title: The Silent Thunderclap
definition: An unspoken, universal truth that transcends languages and cultures, resonating as the shared foundation of human understanding.

difficulty_levels.beginner: An unspoken, universal truth that transcends languages and cultures, resonating as the shared foundation of human understanding.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: An unspoken, universal truth that transcends languages and cultures, resonating as the shared foundation of human understanding.
difficulty_levels.expert: Navigating the space between languages and cultures reveals a universal truth beyond spoken words, a silent thunderclap at the heart of all knowledge.

extra_fields.insight: Navigating the space between languages and cultures reveals a universal truth beyond spoken words, a silent thunderclap at the heart of all knowledge.
